calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-27-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Floyd Butler.
See judgment in case 55083.
Robert Resner, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: collectronics, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Plaintiff's Witness: Gary Looney, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Gregory H. James aka Gregory Boki as follows:
Damages $94,711.80
Prejudgment Interest $116,645.25
Costs $455.50, for a total of $211,812.55
Judgment signed in open court.
